steps.title: Locate Mexico's 1995 value in the table
steps.content: The question asks for Mexico's copper mining in 1995. Find the Mexico row and read the corresponding 1995 column value.

steps.title: Match the value to the correct choice
steps.content: Reading the Mexico row at 1995 yields 0.33 million metric tons. The other three choices are 1995 values from different countries—Indonesia (0.44), Peru (0.38), and the United States (1.85). That matches choice B — B is correct.
